---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem you're trying to solve

What are you trying to do that Sekha doesn't support today? Describe the pain,
not the solution.

## Proposed approach (optional)

If you have an idea for how it should work, describe it. Leave blank if you
want to discuss the approach first.

## Scope check

Sekha's v0.1.0 scope: **hard enforcement for regex-matchable tool-input
patterns via Claude Code's PreToolUse hook**. Explicit non-goals: behavioral
rule enforcement, vector search, knowledge graphs, cloud sync, multi-user.
See `docs/roadmap-v1.1.md` for what's queued.

Does your request fit the current scope? If not, we can still discuss, but be
aware it might land in v2+ or not at all.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you look at? Why doesn't it work for you?

## Additional context

Links to related discussions, similar features in other tools, screenshots.
